title: Weather: Partly cloudy and cool
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The regional...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The regional weather outlook for Thursday 18 September.

There are no weather warnings for the Garden Route or Karoo today.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeFine and cold to cool, but cloudy to partly cloudy in the south.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate south-easterly to easterly but fresh along the south coast. It will be south-westerly to westerly light to moderate along the south western southern parts in the morning.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeFog in places over the interior at first, otherwise fine and cool, but partly cloudy to cloudy in the south. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate westerly at first, otherwise fresh to strong south-westerly, moderating from the west in the evening.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFog in places at first, otherwise fine and cool but partly cloudy along the coast and adjacent interior. It will become cloudy south of escarpment in the afternoon with light rain in places along the Wild coast and adjacent interior in the evening.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate westerly at first, otherwise fresh south-westerly.


> Extended forecast


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
